general.name: mos_target_bhm_rm_tweaks_parquet
general.description:
Reverberation mapping (RM) targets for SDSS-V.

This table enables small modifications to be made to the set of reverberation mapping (RM) targets selected for observation in SDSS-V. The dr20_bhm_rm_tweaks table allows identification of confirmed QSOs which were observed in plate mode that should be preferentially targeted in forward-looking FPS mode observations, and reject candidates which the plate-mode observations have revealed to be unsuitable for continued RM studies.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_bhm_rm_tweaks.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

rm_field_name.name: rm_field_name
rm_field_name.description: Human readable name of the field (e.g. 'XMM-LSS', 'COSMOS', 'SDSS-RM')

plate.name: plate
plate.description: PLATEID of the SDSS-V spectrum from which the visual inspection information was derived

fiberid.name: fiberid
fiberid.description: FIBERID of the SDSS-V spectrum from which the visual inspection information was derived

mjd.name: mjd
mjd.description: MJD of the SDSS-V spectrum from which the visual inspection information was derived

catalogid.name: catalogid
catalogid.description: SDSS-V catalogid from version '0.1.0' of the crossmatch

ra.name: ra
ra.description: PLUG_RA of the SDSS-V spectrum from which the visual inspection information was derived

dec.name: dec
dec.description: PLUG_DEC of the SDSS-V spectrum from which the visual inspection information was derived

rm_suitability.name: rm_suitability
rm_suitability.description: Flag indicating if this target is well suited to continued RM observation. Known values are: -1 - unconfirmed (but might still be a good QSO target, e.g. due to unplugged fiber, or unverified visual inspection); 0 - target is probably unsuitable for RM, do not observe in the future; 1 - target is probably suitable for RM

in_plate.name: in_plate
in_plate.description: flag indicating if this target was included in a plate design during SDSS-V plate observations

firstcarton.name: firstcarton
firstcarton.description: 'firstcarton' that selected this target for observation in the SDSS-V plate-mode operations phase

gaia_g.name: gaia_g
gaia_g.description: optical magnitude of the target (Gaia G-band)

date_set.name: date_set
date_set.description: Human readable date string, e.g. '25-Nov-2020' that indicates roughly when this entry was added

pkey.name: pkey
pkey.description: primary key of the table entry
